summary: Phase M0 has been corrected against the authoritative fourth-round verifier report without adding implementation code or M1+ scope. Spec 13 now preserves the established advisory evidence-bundle outcome: a 64-MiB-plus-one-byte blocking bundle is CI_EVIDENCE_LIMIT/failed, an advisory bundle is CI_EVIDENCE_LIMIT/incomplete, and a known provider timeout remains CI_EVIDENCE_LIMIT/failed, with exact-bound and first-over tests mirrored in the security reconciliation inventory. Spec 16 now inventories the CLI renderer's existing 16-MiB peak-RSS ceiling and exact fixtures; scans every decoded logical_path and source_identity as its original length-delimited UTF-8 bytes in addition to the canonical metadata document; and attributes metadata findings with a deterministic digest-only tuple locator plus exact field enum, one-to-one manifest mapping, bounded recovery, escaping fixtures, and duplicate-canary count tests. All seven M0 specs remain Draft in SPECS.md with accurate dependencies, and there are no open questions.
